title: Tephroseris sukaczevii
intro: Tephroseris sukaczevii, also known as Sukatschev's Hawk's Beard, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Tephroseris sukaczevii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Tephroseris sukaczevii is often prepared as a tincture or a decoction, and is used to make infusions and teas that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
